auth.title: Welcome to Mosaic
auth.subtitle: Sign in to register for events and manage your registrations.
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your inbox — we sent you a sign-in link.

home.heroSubtitle: Conferences, camps and gatherings — find your event and register in your language.
home.noEvents: No published events yet. Check back soon.

wizard.title: Register for {event}
wizard.typeCountHelp: Choose how many people you are registering in each category.
wizard.successBody: You can see the status of every participant below.
wizard.submitError: Something went wrong while submitting. Your answers are saved on this device — please try again.
wizard.modeTitle: Is this a single or a family registration?
wizard.modeHelp: You can register just yourself, or several people at once.
wizard.modeFamilyHelp: I'm registering my family or a group.
wizard.noModeSelected: Choose a registration type to continue.
wizard.singleTypeTitle: What type of participant are you?
wizard.singleTypeHelp: Pick the option that describes you.

validation.notAnOption: Choose one of the listed options

myRegs.title: My registrations
myRegs.empty: You have not registered for any events yet.
myRegs.cancelConfirm: Cancel {name}? A waitlisted participant may take this spot.

console.title: Organizer console
console.noAccess: You do not have organizer access. Contact an administrator.
console.previewHint: This is a preview — answers are not saved.
console.noParticipants: No participants match the current filters.
console.createError: Something went wrong creating the event. Please try again.
console.createNoAccess: Your account does not have permission to create events. Ask an administrator to grant you organizer access.
console.createDateError: The end date must be after the start date.
console.contactHelp: Shown publicly on the event page.
console.selectTypeHelp: Add a participant type from the list below, or create your own.
console.adminUsersHelp: Admins manage everything, including this console. Global organizers can manage every event. Anyone can create their own events.
console.transferConfirm: Transfer super admin to {name}? You will become a regular admin.
console.levelViewDesc: View and export registrations and payments.
console.levelScholarshipDesc: View, plus manage and add scholarships.
console.levelCheckinDesc: Scholarship, plus add registrants and edit, add or delete payments.
console.levelUpdateDesc: Check-in, plus change the event and its questions, and delete registrants.
console.levelFullDesc: Can do everything, including managing the team.
console.requestRoleTitle: Want to help manage all events?
console.requestRoleIntro: Global organizers can view and manage every event. Request the role and an administrator will review it.
console.rolesHelp: What each role allows. Standard roles can have their privileges turned on or off but cannot be renamed or deleted; custom roles are fully editable while unused.
console.customRolesEventHelp: Define roles available only on this event. Roles marked “All events” are managed from the admin console.
console.roleInUse: This role is still assigned to at least one team member.
console.saveFailed: Saving failed — your latest changes are not stored
console.publishFailed: Publishing failed — the form was not published
console.loadError: Could not load participants. Adjust your search or try again.
console.newFormError: Could not create the form. Please try again.
console.formModeSingleHelp: Shown when a respondent registers only themself.
console.formModeFamilyHelp: Shown when a respondent registers a family or group.
console.copyQuestionsHelp: Reuse the questions of an existing form so you don't have to rebuild them.
console.publishNeedsQuestion: A form must include at least one question

profile.title: My profile
profile.namePromptIntro: Add your name so organizers know who you are. You can change it later in your profile.
profile.namePromptRequired: Please enter your first and last name.
profile.themeHelp: Choose light or dark, or follow your device.
profile.updateError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
